explanation.disease_text_preview: Disease: Gangliocytoma Description: A well differentiated, slow growing neuroepithelial neoplasm composed of neoplastic, mature ganglion cells. Phenotypes: Amenorrhea; Dementia; Impotence; Elevated circulating growth hormone concentration; Hyperhidrosis; Excessive daytime somnolence; Abnormal cerebe
